mapper.select:
SELECT event_type as eventType, count(DISTINCT patient_unique_id) as count FROM clinical_event_data_derived
GROUP BY event_type
mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
ce.event_type ce.start_date ce.stop_date ce.clinical_event_id
DESC ASC
, ce.clinical_event_id ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.select:
SELECT ev.clinicalEventId, ev.eventType, ev.patientId, ev.studyId, ev.startDate, ev.stopDate, ced.`key` AS `key`, ced.value AS value FROM ( SELECT ce.clinical_event_id AS clinicalEventId, ce.event_type AS eventType, p.stable_id AS patientId, cs.cancer_study_identifier AS studyId, ce.start_date AS startDate, ce.stop_date AS stopDate
) ev LEFT JOIN ( SELECT clinical_event_id, CAST(`key` AS Nullable(String)) AS `key`, CAST(value AS Nullable(String)) AS value FROM clinical_event_data WHERE clinical_event_id IN ( SELECT ce.clinical_event_id FROM clinical_event ce INNER JOIN patient p ON ce.patient_id = p.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study cs ON p.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id WHERE cs.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND p.stable_id = #{patientId} ) ) ced ON ev.clinicalEventId = ced.clinical_event_id ORDER BY
ev.eventType ev.startDate ev.stopDate ev.clinicalEventId
DESC ASC
, ev.clinicalEventId ASC

SELECT count(*) AS totalCount FROM clinical_event ce INNER JOIN patient p ON ce.patient_id = p.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study cs ON p.cancer_study_id = cs.cancer_study_id WHERE cs.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND p.stable_id = #{patientId}
